center.name: Sub-Himalayan Range
center.summary: Sub-Himalayan Range是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括細嘴兀鷲，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |name-list-style=amp |year=1957 |title=Birds from Nepal |journal=Fieldiana: Zoology |volume=41 |issue=1 |page=55 |url=https://archive.org/details/birdsfromnepal411rand}} }} The slender-billed vulture (Gyps tenuirostris) is an Old World vulture species native to sub-Himalayan regions and Southeast Asia
